About: It is about jazz and rock music.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Mondo Grosso.
It is associated with Attica Blues.
It is associated with The Beach Boys.
It is associated with Seiichi Yamamoto.
It is associated with Mina Aoe.

It has a support band called The Gossip of Jaxx.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by cabaret and kayōkyoku inspired songs.
It is characterized by its use of Japanese language.
It is characterized by its use of English language.
IsA: It is a Japanese jazz and rock musical duo.
KnownFor: It is known for the song Midnight Dejavu Shikisai no Blues.
It is known for the song Kuchibashi ni Cherry.
It is known for performing the theme songs for the drama Reverse Edge Ōkawabata Tanteisha.
OccurredIn: It occurred in the Kansai region.
PublishedAs: It was published as a stand-alone single extended play in 2001.
PublishedBy: It was published by Metro Crew Records.
It was published by RD Records.
It was published by Toy's Factory.
PublishedIn: It was published in 1998.

It was published in 1999.
It was published in 2000.
It was published in 2001.
It was published in 2002.
It was published in 2004.
It was published in 2006.
It was published in 2009.
It was published in 2010.
It was published in 2013.
It was published in 2019.
UsedAs: It is used as a theme song for the Nippon TV drama Shiritsu Tantei Hama Mike.
UsedFor: It is used for the drama Kirakira Hikaru soundtrack.
It is used for the drama Reverse Edge Ōkawabata Tanteisha theme songs.
UsedIn: It is used in the soundtrack for the drama Kirakira Hikaru.
It is used in the drama Reverse Edge Ōkawabata Tanteisha.
